description_long: This object is a modern Huawei mobile phone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, glossy touchscreen display with minimal bezels, showing a lock screen with a time, date, and a wallpaper image of a woman holding a phone, overlaid with abstract red and orange shapes. The back is matte black with a single camera lens in the top left corner, a fingerprint sensor centered below it, and the Huawei logo near the bottom. The sides are metallic silver, with visible seams and a thin profile, and likely house physical buttons and SIM tray. The overall design is minimalist and professional, with a combination of glass, metal, and plastic materials. This phone would be commonly seen in urban environments, carried by pedestrians or placed on tables in public spaces.
description: A sleek, modern Huawei smartphone with a large glossy touchscreen, matte black back, and metallic silver sides. Features include a single rear camera, fingerprint sensor, and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large touchscreen display with a lock screen, wallpaper, and minimal bezels.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the phone's slim metallic edge and possible button placements.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the matte black surface, single camera in the top left, fingerprint sensor, and Huawei logo.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slim metallic edge and possible SIM tray slot.
attribute_brand_logo: The Huawei logo is visible in white text, centered near the bottom of the back panel and also on the bottom front bezel.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a lock screen with the time '12:00', date 'Thursday, Apr 12', a wallpaper image of a woman holding a phone, and abstract red and orange shapes. There are no visible app icons or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: A single camera lens is located in the top left corner on the back of the phone, accompanied by a small flash.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are not directly visible in these views, but typical placements suggest a power button and volume rocker on the right edge, and a SIM tray on the left edge.
